# Copilot Instructions for coding_AI

## Project Guidelines

### Code Style
- Use clear, concise naming for files and variables.
- Reference [README.md](README.md) for examples of resource listing and markdown structure.
- Prefer markdown for documentation and prompts.

### Architecture
- This repo is a collection of AI learning materials, prompts, and references.
- Major folders: `prompts/` (prompt files, cheatsheets), `custom_instructions/` (agent instructions).
- See [README.md](README.md) for links to key papers and resources.

### Build and Test
- No build or test commands required; repo is for educational materials.
- To add new content, create markdown files in the relevant folder.

### Project Conventions
- Use markdown for all instructional and prompt files.
- Link to external resources and papers where possible.
- Organize prompts and instructions by topic or agent type.
- See [prompts/prompt-cheatsheet.md](prompts/prompt-cheatsheet.md) for prompt formatting examples.

### Integration Points
- Reference external AI tools, papers, and repos as needed.
- Example: [taskapp](https://github.com/dejanu/taskapp) for AI-enabled projects.

### Security
- No sensitive code or credentials stored in this repo.
- If referencing authentication or API keys, use placeholders and never commit secrets.

---

For more details, see [README.md](README.md) and [prompts/prompt-cheatsheet.md](prompts/prompt-cheatsheet.md).
